pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh, which define and expect the PsychoPy experiment file to be saved at this path.
Verified via setup_task.sh, which explicitly creates this directory and generates synthetic search array images ('array_1.png', 'array_2.png', 'array_3.png') inside it.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a PsychoPy experiment saved at '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/spotlight_search.psyexp'. The experiment uses three synthetic search array images generated during setup, which are located in the '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/stimuli' directory.
